overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand medieval dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, filled with people seated at long wooden tables, illuminated by hundreds of floating candles in magical chandeliers and warm sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows at the far end. The camera slowly advances through the central aisle.

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly advances through a magnificent Gothic dining hall filled with diners seated at long wooden tables. Hundreds of floating candles in magical chandeliers provide warm illumination from above, while afternoon light streams through a large stained glass window at the far end. The stone architecture features tall Gothic arches, and groups of NPCs are seated on both sides eating and conversing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, steady advance through a magnificent Gothic dining hall that draws the viewer deeper into a scene of magical warmth and grandeur. It begins by gliding through the central aisle, passing long wooden tables where groups of diners eat and converse beneath the glow of hundreds of floating candles. As the camera moves forward, the perspective emphasizes the scale of the stone architecture and the rhythmic sequence of tall Gothic arches lining the path. The scene then opens further toward the far end of the hall, where the warm interior light blends with bright afternoon sunlight streaming through a large stained glass window.
